excluded_defs.name: reportInputMismatch
excluded_defs.reason: read: the BeanProperty overload at line 1870 already calls prependPath() manually; did not modify this overload to avoid double-prepending

exploration_log.aha_moment: prependPath() already existed on DatabindException and was used by specific callers (reportInputMismatch(BeanProperty) and UnrecognizedPropertyException); the fix just needed to call _prependContextPath() in the three 'bare' overloads that weren't doing any path tracking.

dead_ends.explored: Whether to modify reportInputMismatch(BeanProperty) as well
dead_ends.why_irrelevant: That overload already calls prependPath() for the immediate property, adding the full stack would double-count it

exploration_log.hindsight: Should have checked the BeanProperty overload first to understand that prependPath() was already being used, avoiding the question of whether this mechanism existed at all.

alternatives: Add path to the exception message string
key_decisions.decision: Add _prependContextPath() helper and call it in 3 overloads that had no path tracking
key_decisions.reasoning: prependPath() is the existing API for path tracking in JacksonException; adding to message string would be non-idiomatic and harder for callers to inspect programmatically

solve_notes: Added `_prependContextPath(MismatchedInputException)` helper that walks the `TokenStreamContext` chain via `getParent()` and calls `prependPath()` for each named object property and array-index segment. Modified the three 'bare' `reportInputMismatch` overloads (ValueDeserializer, Class, JavaType) to call this helper before throwing. Updated `release-notes/VERSION` with a minor behavior-change note.
task_text:
When deserialization fails on a deeply nested field, the thrown
`MismatchedInputException` only reports the immediate field name
without the full JSON path (e.g., just `"age"` instead of
`"person.address.age"`). Fix the path tracking in
`DeserializationContext` to accumulate the full property path using
the `JsonStreamContext` stack. Also add a corresponding entry to
`release-notes/VERSION` documenting the improved error message
format as a minor behavior change.

thrash_preventing_defs.name: reportPropertyInputMismatch
thrash_preventing_defs.reason: read: also calls prependPath() for property name; checking this confirms the pattern and that the change should not be applied here as well

tier_difference_reasoning: minimum_sufficient covers the edited method sites. thrash_preventing adds the BeanProperty overload and reportPropertyInputMismatch — an agent that hasn't read these would risk adding _prependContextPath() to them as well, causing double-prepending of the immediate field. Seeing these upfront prevents the agent from applying the fix too broadly.
